title: glyceria convoluta
intro: Glyceria convoluta, also known as convoluted manna grass, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the grass family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Glyceria convoluta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions.
